purpose: Source files to load into a future custom GPT/project knowledge base
status: Product model v2 completed. The product is now MISIS_Digital Student Support: a student-facing support portal for university digital services. Browser -> web/Nginx -> app/v1 API works; tickets use category/resource model; active/resolved/history flow works; app logs contain category/resource; Promtail adds category as a Loki label; Grafana dashboard app logs and product metrics are updated; admin remains an Ansible control node.
last_completed_stage: Product model v2: MISIS_Digital Student Support, category/resource model, API v1, active/resolved tickets, frontend category->resource dropdown, Promtail category label, Grafana App logs update
current_next_stage: Product observability v2: metrics and alerts by category/resource/priority/source
